forecasts.detailed: Rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 71, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. South wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

Showers and thunderstorms likely before 9pm, then rain showers likely and patchy fog between 9pm and 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 47. West wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
